title: do not log travis in #cri-o channel
body:
https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/master/.travis.yml#L59

Can you guys change it to kpod channel? I see this in cri-o channel:
```
08:22         travis-ci : projectatomic/libpod#271 (auto - 2858100 : TomSweeneyRedHat): The build passed.
08:22         travis-ci : Change view : https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/compare/5cfd7a313fca...28581007a906
08:22         travis-ci : Build details : https://travis-ci.org/projectatomic/libpod/builds/303521442
```
